sections.paragraph:
Original: יתד

Transliteration: yâthêd

Phonetic: yaw-thade'

BDB Definition:

  1. pin, stake, peg, nail
    1. pin, peg, tent pin, tent stake
    2. nail, pin (figuratively)
    3. pin (used in weaving)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to pin through or fast

TWOT entry: 932a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
